E1 - How to Catch a Lizard
programme.desc: Tag along as Dr. Amanda rescues a blind pet baboon, and watch Dr. Charlotte’s tricky surgery on a pangolin whose leg must be amputated after a run-in with poachers. Later, chase a rhino, two young baboons gone AWOL, and a fiesty monitor lizard.

programme.title: E2 - An Island Home
programme.desc: Face a tough decision when Esti’s leg infection puts the brakes on this young duiker’s release. Then track and collar a young lion with Dr. Amanda; check on an ailing bush baby; and greet the noisy new addition to the center, a grumpy grey parrot.

programme.title: E1 - River of Life
programme.desc: Avoid scaly and feathery dangers with wallabies, see koolamana lizards battle for mates, and feast with crocodile hatchlings. Brave dangerous rapids and understand the cultural and biological importance of a local river as the rainy season arrives.

programme.title: E2 - Tidal Territory
programme.desc: Battle for dominion over the river with crocs, then catch glimpses of an ultra-rare mangrove snake and an endangered nabarlek wallaby. Take to the ocean to see humpback whale mothers raise their calves, then be hunted by false killer whales.

programme.title: E5 - Hot Springs Pack
programme.desc: Meet a close-knit family of wild dogs who work together to raise pups and hunt enough food to feed the whole pack. While their well-coordinated hunts are successful, the wet season brings challenges when some of the team strikes out on their own.

programme.title: E4 - Jaguar Den
programme.desc: In the heart of Brazil, the largest cat in the Americas, the magnificent jaguar, reigns over a magical land filled with natural beauty and diversity.

programme.title: E1 - How to Catch a Lizard
programme.desc: Tag along as Dr. Amanda rescues a blind pet baboon, and watch Dr. Charlotte’s tricky surgery on a pangolin whose leg must be amputated after a run-in with poachers. Later, chase a rhino, two young baboons gone AWOL, and a fiesty monitor lizard.

programme.title: E3 - One Very Lost Sea Turtle
programme.desc: Follow the team in healing and releasing a grumpy sea turtle, and then meet a sea lion with an unusual injury that must be taken by crane to the rescue centre. Find out how the vet aids an aging fruit bat and a community rescues a one-eyed seal pup.

programme.title: E2 - Tidal Territory

programme.title: E5 - The Hollow Heart
programme.desc: This is the incredible story of a tree that has been around for eight hundred years… that can withstand the harshest conditions… and that is more loved by insects, birds and animals than any other…the enormous Baobab. Rooted on the savannah of Malilangwe Game Reserve in southern Zimbabwe.

programme.title: E1 - Lemur Spirit
programme.desc: This is the story of a day in the life of an Indris Family following a mother, father, and their three offspring around their home in the rainforest of Mantadia National Park in Madagascar.

programme.title: E5 - Rana: Queen of the Jungle
programme.desc: One of the most iconic animals on Earth stalks the jungles of India: the Bengal Tiger. Over the course of a single day, we follow the fortunes of one mother and her three young cubs. She must provide enough food for her family to stay alive.

programme.title: E5 - Hot Springs Pack
programme.desc: Meet a close-knit family of wild dogs who work together to raise pups and hunt enough food to feed the whole pack. While their well-coordinated hunts are successful, the wet season brings challenges when some of the team strikes out on their own.

programme.title: E1 - Sirga, Loki and Hugger
programme.desc: Walk on the wild side with Sirga the lion, whose human pal, Val, has been by her side since she was an orphaned cub. See Loki the raven entertain his BFF Elliott, cuddle with Hugger the stingray, and see why Trish and Garri the koala are like family.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: Built For Billions
programme.desc: ‘Built for Billions' uncovers the blueprints behind the world's biggest tech empires-how they scale, monetize, and dominate markets. From innovative revenue models to dramatic turnarounds, each episode reveals lessons in resilience, leadership and reinvention that power profitability in the digital age.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, “CNBC Meets” is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: E11 - 分組約會
programme.desc: 由伊能靜、黃聖依、朱正廷、金子涵、戴燕妮、張純燁6位常駐戀愛觀察員、微反應專家姜振宇以及鄭爽組成「戀愛觀察團」，見證素人嘉賓們從素不相識到牽手成功的浪漫愛情故事。

programme.title: E8 - 新家庭加入反差兄弟萌點爆棚
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E6 - 周柯宇驚喜回歸直接榮升店長？
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E8 - 新家庭加入反差兄弟萌點爆棚
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E2 - 《火力全開》舞台燃炸
programme.desc: 集結25位跨領域青春藝人，組建國內首個全明星流行表演合唱團「燃青團」；跳出傳統音樂真人秀的固化框架，不爭C位、不設淘汰，更關注合唱聲部，以團魂養成、情緒共振為核心，帶來全新觀看體驗；全景式記錄一群年輕人從陌生疏離到默契共生，從個體閃耀到集體綻放的熱血蛻變歷程。

programme.title: E6 - 周柯宇驚喜回歸直接榮升店長？
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E11 - Baby John’s Football Skills
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns how to play soccer! With help from his family, he practices his skills and learns that sharing the ball with friends makes the game even more fun. Get ready to move your body and score the winning goal!

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! The adventure begins when Princess Cat is flying her plane but gets in a sticky jammy mess, causing her to lose control! It's up to Kii & Yii to get her down safely. Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: E1 - Kittens, Tutus & Fun Tea Parties!
programme.desc: It's CeCe Time, full of kittens, tutus & fun! The big day arrives when CeCe gets her very own adorable kitten! She loves her new friend & wants to put on a show, so she gets in her ballerina outfit to dance for her kitty. Then, after hosting many tea parties for her stuffed animals, CeCe invites her real friends JJ & Bella over for a high tea party! From ice skating with Mom to imagining stick ponies are unicorns, it's always a fun & graceful day with CeCe!

programme.title: E8 - Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning lessons at parties & games! Pogo is invited to Jeff's party, but Pogo wants it to be energetic while Jeff wants it to be calm, so they must learn to compromise. Then, Newt is desperate to win a gold star at Fuse's gym challenges, but she keeps losing! She has to learn to persevere & not give up. The lessons continue as Lulu learns to wait her turn at a funfair & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy greens.

programme.title: E5 - An Adventure, Pedals, Rescue & Stars!
programme.desc: Join the Minibods for an adventure with pedals, rescues & stars! Lulu goes camping but realizes she's left her favorite Binky Bunny behind & has to learn how to cope. Then, Newt goes on an adventure to find a real-life Flutterbug, but she has to be brave when her bike's stabilizers come off! The adventures continue as Jeff overcomes his fear of mud to rescue his feather duster & Bubbles builds a rocket to try & reach a big purple star in the sky!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E1 - Awesome Animal Facts!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning awesome facts about all kinds of animals! He & D.BO travel back in time to meet the biggest dinosaurs, like the Argentinosaurus, & even try to keep a T-Rex as a pet for a day! Back in the present, they shrink down to count a shark's teeth with a pilot fish dentist. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how elephants use their trunks to keep cool & discovers why cats have whiskers from a local feline celebrity.

programme.title: E11 - Baby John’s Football Skills
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns how to play soccer! With help from his family, he practices his skills and learns that sharing the ball with friends makes the game even more fun. Get ready to move your body and score the winning goal!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Imagination Adventure!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his animal friends on a big imagination adventure! First, Wally teaches everyone how to sail like real pirates, but they'll need to work together to stay on course! Then, when Mimi gets hungry, she decides the moon must be made of cheese, so the friends build a rocketship to fly there & find out! The adventure continues as they follow a treasure map to find special shape keys & help Little Red Riding JJ avoid Wally Wolf's silly traps in the woods.

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Clubhouse Game Day
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate clubhouse game day with JJ & his friends! The competition heats up as JJ & Wally compete in an adrenaline-pumping go-kart race full of fun tricks & obstacles. Then, it's time for a silly game of hide-and-seek, where Boba finds the most clever hiding places! The games continue with a balloon boat race, a round of Duck Duck Goose & a clean-up dance party after the clubhouse gets messy. It's a day packed with fun & friendly competition!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E1 - A Fun School Day with JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his friends for a fun school day at Melon Patch Academy! Ms. Appleberry finds exciting ways to learn, like using building blocks & drawings to practice the alphabet. Then, the kids play a fun guessing game to learn all about the five senses & how to sign them in ASL! The learning continues as they sing about the days of the week, play a fun alphabet photo game on a rainy day & enjoy story time with the whole family. It's a day packed with learning & fun!

programme.title: E9 - Football Fever: Goals & Grooves
programme.desc: Join JJ for a packed day of fun! Compete in a giant soccer match, play basketball against animal friends, and hit a home run in baseball. Then, put on your detective hat to solve the mystery of the ten missing buses. It’s a day of sports and fun!

programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: À l'affiche
programme.desc: Comment les cinéastes, les romanciers, les artistes racontent-ils le monde ? France 24 part à la rencontre d'une culture engagée dans son temps.

programme.desc: The story begins in 1894, when Baron Pierre de Courbetin announces his intention to stage the first Olympic games of the Modern Era within two years in Athens.

programme.desc: Grissom, Sara and Warrick are called to investigate an abandoned, blood-spattered apartment, and Nick and Catherine must examine a dead scuba diver lodged in a tree.

programme.desc: When, Frasier gets 'dumped' by his high-powered girlfriend Sam, he makes a fool of himself trying to win her back.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.desc: Entre Nous is a France 24 program that brings together in-depth discussions and interviews with experts, cultural figures, and influencers. The show explores current social, political, and cultural topics, offering viewers insightful perspectives and thoughtful analysis on issues shaping the world today.

programme.title: French Connections
programme.desc: French Connections revolves around France, its top stories and news, its experience in various spheres and cultural life, sport events, health care and education, cuisine and so much more. Find out what is like to live in France, get to know its regions, and feel the true taste of France.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind'
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: E23 - Stick Together
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.desc: What's that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It's the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: E38 - Double Babysitter
programme.desc: When Uncle Rad and Frisky accidentally turn up to babysit Bluey and Bingo on the same night, they have to work together to make Bluey feel better about babysitter put-downs.

programme.title: E7 - Unicorse
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.desc: Jetting off in his Safari mobile, Andy heads to Indonesia in search of the world's largest lizard, the Komodo dragon.

programme.desc: Glitch takes all the sand from the Academy beach, leaving the local crabs with nowhere to hide from hungry seagulls. Can the Go Jetters repair the beach before it's too late?

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.desc: In this aerial adventure the Go Jetters are on the Strait of Gibraltar, Southern Spain to follow a group of migrating baby stalks as they make their journey from Spain to Africa.

programme.title: E15 - Pig Gets Big
programme.desc: Farmer Jackson was just trying to grow some giant tomatoes, but he wound up with a giant pig! Now, Mojo and Bo have to get Felix back to normal size before Swoppiton gets stomped.

programme.title: E16 - Pow Tao
programme.desc: Tao asks Mojo and Bo to help him film an action-packed snowboarding video, but Mojo is not so steady on the slopes. Which top can they swap to grab the white-hot snow shots?

programme.title: E16 - The Medicine Badge
programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: E18 - The Making Friends Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are off for a Jamboree to make some new friends, play games and have a picnic. They meet another group of young animals with their very own version of Duggee but everything they do is different.

programme.title: Operation Barbarossa - War Of Annihilation - Part 1: Summer
programme.desc: On 22 June 1941, the German Wehrmacht launched a war of aggression against the Soviet Union. Under the code name ‘Operation Barbarossa', the campaign aimed to bring the vast country in the east to its knees. Millions of people died as a result.

programme.title: Operation Barbarossa - War Of Annihilation - Part 1: Summer
programme.desc: On 22 June 1941, the German Wehrmacht launched a war of aggression against the Soviet Union. Under the code name ‘Operation Barbarossa', the campaign aimed to bring the vast country in the east to its knees. Millions of people died as a result.

programme.title: Bodybuilding
programme.desc: Gen Z is more fitness-crazy than ever before. We meet Mirtel, 17 years old, in Tallinn, Estonia - she has ONE goal: to win gold at the European Bodybuilding Championships. We accompany them through the toughest phase of preparation and go to the championship in Spain. What does it cost to give EVERYTHING for this - and will it be enough in the end?

programme.title: Call An Ambulance! The Race To Save Urban Trees
programme.desc: A 'tree ambulance” in Kolkata is saving trees, fighting heat waves, and protecting biodiversity. Plus: turning wastewater into a solution for water scarcity.

programme.title: Is Africa's School System Failing Its Youth?
programme.desc: This week's show explores the push to promote African languages in classrooms, the challenges of changing entrenched systems, and the real-life impact on learners. Is it time to rethink how Africa learns?

programme.title: From Competition To Combat: Athletes In The Baltic States Prepare For Defen
programme.desc: In the Baltic states, athletes are preparing for more than just competition. As Russia's war in Ukraine reshapes Europe's security landscape, athletes in Latvia, Lithuania and Estonia balance elite training with military service. From conscription to volunteer defense leagues, their skills are increasingly tied to national defense, blurring the line between being an athlete and a soldier.

From conscription to volunteer defense leagues, their skills are increasingly tied to national defense, blurring the line between being an athlete and a soldier.

programme.title: Operation Barbarossa - War Of Annihilation - Part 1: Summer
programme.desc: On 22 June 1941, the German Wehrmacht launched a war of aggression against the Soviet Union. Under the code name ‘Operation Barbarossa', the campaign aimed to bring the vast country in the east to its knees. Millions of people died as a result.

programme.title: From Competition To Combat: Athletes In The Baltic States Prepare For Defen
programme.desc: In the Baltic states, athletes are preparing for more than just competition. As Russia's war in Ukraine reshapes Europe's security landscape, athletes in Latvia, Lithuania and Estonia balance elite training with military service. From conscription to volunteer defense leagues, their skills are increasingly tied to national defense, blurring the line between being an athlete and a soldier.

programme.title: Is Africa's School System Failing Its Youth?
programme.desc: This week's show explores the push to promote African languages in classrooms, the challenges of changing entrenched systems, and the real-life impact on learners. Is it time to rethink how Africa learns?

programme.title: Call An Ambulance! The Race To Save Urban Trees
programme.desc: A 'tree ambulance” in Kolkata is saving trees, fighting heat waves, and protecting biodiversity. Plus: turning wastewater into a solution for water scarcity.

programme.title: E13 - Food
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: E14 - Columbia
programme.desc: Catfish and Rooftop go on a mission with the Colombian military's anti-narcotics division, test bulletproof clothing on themselves and experience the most painful insect sting in the world.

programme.title: E1 - South Australia
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-function building and 'The Cube,' experiencing a Chef's Table, and concludes at Wirra Wirra winery, where he cooks Yogurt Flatbread with Olive Oil and Dukka, enjoying it with the staff and their wines.

programme.title: E8 - Axis Deer
programme.desc: Yia travels to Texas to hunt arguably the tastiest of all deer. Native to India, the Axis deer were introduced in Texas in 1932 as a prized game meat for ranchers. The Texas hill country turned out to be the perfect habitat for Axis deer, who quickly escaped their high fence ranches, establishing a healthy wild breeding population. Now with over 150,000 Axis deer roaming the hill country, these deer are competing with native white tail deer for resources. Local rancher Chris Hughes has a solution- a mobile harvesting trailer where he culls wild Axis deer from overpopulated farms. Chris will show Yia how harvesting this species has become a full-time business and delicious solution.

programme.title: E420 - Don't You Fore-get About Me / Tough Cookies
programme.desc: Hit by the realization that her big sister will be going off to college soon, Leni tries to thwart Lori's plans. // Lincoln and Clyde start their own cookie-making business, but realize it's a lot more work than they realized.

programme.title: E202 - Wrong Text / Emergency Family Tribunal
programme.desc: Jack gets his first phone and immediately sends the wrong text to Will, forcing the kids to do whatever it takes to delete it. // When the last hallasand goes missing, fingers point to Halmoni and only a family tribunal will set the record straight.

programme.title: E211 - The Unusual Suspects
programme.desc: With some loose Mutagen at stake, Mikey questions Rod's siblings, the notorious and eccentric MAUDE and TODD... both of whom are trying to get their hands on some mutant blood as well. Can Mikey find Rod before it's too late?

programme.title: E235 - Plankton Paranoia / Library Cards
programme.desc: Plankton hasn't tried to steal the secret formula in a while...and that's making Mr. Krabs nervous! // When Patrick discovers the pineapple's library, SpongeBob introduces him to the wonderful world of book learning!

programme.title: E720 - Love Me Tenor
programme.desc: When Lincoln and friends discover Gus has a hidden talent, they work together to help him live out his dream.

programme.title: E285 - Ride Patrick Ride
programme.desc: SpongeBob teaches Patrick how to ride a bike.

programme.title: E108 - For Your Spies Only
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe attend Parent-Teacher Night, leaving Chloe and friends home without adult supervision. When Jinx finds the Air Lair, he believes spies are targeting the school, and his meddling puts the Thundermans' school jobs at risk.

programme.title: E408 - Pat-Tathlon / Upturn's Downturn
programme.desc: The Patricks compete in a series of games for control of the TV remote. // After driving over Patrick, a court order forces Lady Upturn to live with the Star family.

programme.title: E202 - Wrong Text / Emergency Family Tribunal
programme.desc: Jack gets his first phone and immediately sends the wrong text to Will, forcing the kids to do whatever it takes to delete it. // When the last hallasand goes missing, fingers point to Halmoni and only a family tribunal will set the record straight.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 盛唐初年，氣象萬千；夜魅長安，業孽浮屠。光怪陸離之下盡是怪異之事，血雨腥風間暗藏獵殺危局。盛世奇譚，詭案揭幕。

programme.desc: 盛唐初年，氣象萬千；夜魅長安，業孽浮屠。光怪陸離之下盡是怪異之事，血雨腥風間暗藏獵殺危局。盛世奇譚，詭案揭幕。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 《誰是兇手》講述了一起發生在海舟市的連環兇案，在真相塵封了十七年之後，與這宗懸案有著千絲萬縷聯繫的人們，在各自不可告人的秘密中，一起等待真相浮出水面的故事。 2001年寒冬，海舟市印刷廠家屬院發生了一起命案。新人刑警冷小兵和師兄接到一起報案奔赴現場，卻意外面對海舟市連環殺人案的兇手。冷小兵膽怯不敢開槍，兇手從現場逃走並殺害了師兄李嵐。現場另一名目擊證人是躲在床下的夏木。為繼續留在警隊冷小兵隱瞞了不敢開槍的事，夏木也沒有揭穿他。至此兇手藏匿起來，海舟案懸而未決。十七年後，夏木來到警隊實習，以冷小兵不敢開槍的事作為把柄，要挾他和自己一起查案。而伴随着神秘的心理医生沈雨的出现，一起几乎与十七年前一模一样的案子再次发生，而沈雨身上一个又一个疑团频频出现，凶手究竟是谁？

programme.desc: A reality talk show that offers a candid and often humorous look at the workplace through the eyes of Korea's most outspoken bosses. Each episode follows prominent CEOs, entertainers, and professionals as they go about their daily routines and interact with their employees. Through real workplace situations, the show reveals the challenges of leadership, communication, and management.

programme.desc: Rick braves the notoriously wild Atlantic waters to learn about the ancient fishing method of handlining at Sennen Cove off Land's End. programme.title: Judas And The Black Messiah
programme.desc: Offered a plea deal by the FBI, William O'Neal infiltrates the Illinois chapter of the Black Panther Party as a secret informant to gather intelligence on Chairman Fred Hampton.

programme.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
programme.desc: Mad Max is swept up in a high-octane road war with a group of rebels fleeing from a ruthless warlord in this Oscar-winning fourth instalment .

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 故事講述女主角韓苡茱撞見自己的老公鄭世赫與繼妹韓宥拉出軌後車禍身亡，再次醒來後竟回到四個月前準備試婚紗的時候。得知老公劈腿真相的她決定復仇，於是找上本來要與繼妹相親的徐道國展開聯姻，準備一場手撕綠茶繼妹的報仇計畫。

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In China
programme.desc: Set in 1875, China. Wong Fei Hung and his disciples take on the unscrupulous dealers who are trying to entice gullible Chinese into slavery in America.

programme.title: The Lion Roars
programme.desc: During Soong dynasty, there lived a beauty named Moth Liu. She has gone to blind dates for many times. Still she cannot get married, until she meets a talented poet Seasonal Chan. Seasonal is making his debut as Soo's special guest in a reading-concert, his avant-garde style is badly received, only Moth supports him whole heatedly. Not long afterwards the two get married, and only until then Seasonal realizes that he has married to a roaring lion who limits him on all his activities and expenses...

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In China
programme.desc: Set in 1875, China. Wong Fei Hung and his disciples take on the unscrupulous dealers who are trying to entice gullible Chinese into slavery in America.

programme.title: Four Loves
programme.desc: The Cheng sisters, Li-fang and Li-chiung, leave war-torn Shanghai for Hong Kong. Li-chiung is rescued from robbers by Chien Pei-ling who decides to try out her luck in Hong Kong with the Chengs. They join Uncle and Aunt in Hong Kong. And they get along wonderfully with the daughter Cheng Hsiao-chuan. Li-chiung falls in love with Tony and elopes. That casts the first shadows on the friendships. It's Li-fang's turn to fall in love but both times Pei-ling steals her men. Hsiao-chuan meets Robert. A distraught Li-fang takes out a tutoring job in Macao where she falls in love. Pei-ling loves the same man...

programme.title: Brief Encounter In Shinjuku
programme.desc: Foon, a Public Relations manager, starts a happy life with his wife Ann after remarrying her. Kwan, a new public relation officer in Foon's department, falls in love with Foon after he shields her from being criticized, when there is friction between Foon and Ann. Thus Foon falls in love with Kwan gradually. After a business trip to Tokyo, their relationship becomes much closer, while Ann meets Chu, a councilor, who falls in love with her but can't get Ann's response. When returning to Hong Kong, Kwan doesn't want to destroy Foon's family and decides to marry her fianc? When Foon is depressed by this, Ann finds out the truth. Another rupture breaks out again.

programme.title: The White Storm 3: Heaven or Hell
programme.desc: Hong Kong police agent Cheung works undercover in Kang's drug cartel, while another undercover cop Au successfully earns their trust in an incident, a brotherly-bond is built among the three. After the Police busts the syndicate in Hong Kong, Kang subsequently hide away in the Golden Triangle, by chance he receives a tip-off about the betrayal within his circle of trust...
